## What does this PR do?
Brief description of the change.

## Type of change
- [ ] Question quality fix
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Design / UI improvement
- [ ] Documentation

## For question quality fixes specifically
- [ ] I have verified the correct answer against a StatQuest video or reliable source
- [ ] I have checked that the explanation is accurate
- [ ] I have confirmed this is not a duplicate of another question

## Screenshots (if UI change)
Before / after screenshots here.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have tested this locally
- [ ] No existing question JSON files were unintentionally modified
- [ ] The site builds without errors (`npm run build`)
